heading: Disabled veterans; noncompetitive appointment
label: 3112 Disabled veterans; noncompetitive appointment
text: Under such regulations as the Office of Personnel Management shall prescribe, an agency may make a noncompetitive appointment leading to conversion to career or career-conditional employment of a disabled veteran who has a compensable service-connected disability of 30 percent or more.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 90 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1978 Amendment note under .Oct. 13, 1978section 907 of Pub. L. 95–454section 1101 of this title
